---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a feature for Bastion
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**Is this related to a problem?**
A clear description of the problem this would solve.

**Proposed Solution**
How you think this should work.

**Alternatives Considered**
Any alternative approaches you've thought about.

**Which layer does this affect?**
- [ ] Layer 1 (Session Context)
- [ ] Layer 2 (Persistent Memory)
- [ ] Layer 3 (Project Context)
- [ ] Layer 4 (MCP/Tool Integration)
- [ ] Layer 5 (Skills System)
- [ ] Layer 6 (Dream Cycle)
- [ ] Protocol Extensions
- [ ] Relay Admin
- [ ] Human Client
- [ ] Other

**Additional Context**
Any other context about the feature request.
